class.name: RunInstancesDialog
class.brief_description: Class used to define the number of instances to be created during play mode. As well as their launch arguments and feature tags.

method.name: get_instance_count
method.description: Returns the number of instances that will be created during play.

method.name: get_stored_data
method.description: Returns the launch arguments and feature tags of each instance.

method.name: set_instance_count
method.description: Sets the number of instances to be created during play mode. [code]enable_multiples_instances[/code] is set to [code]false[/code] if instance count equals [code]0[/code]. Unless [param force_debug_mode] is [code]true[/code].

method.name: set_stored_data
method.description: Sets the launch arguments and feature tags of each instance. The number of instances will match the size of the provided dictionary.
